summary: The diff modifies Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx to use '/assets/CETA-2.png' as the image source, but the requirement specifies the file should be saved at 'frontend/public/assets/generated/CETA-2.png' and referenced as '/assets/generated/CETA-2.png'. The actual image paths used in the components point to '/assets/CETA-2.png' (without the 'generated/' subdirectory), which does not match the specified asset path. Additionally, no evidence of the actual binary file being added to 'frontend/public/assets/generated/CETA-2.png' is present in the diff (no new files were added).

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the uploaded CETA-2.png as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/CETA-2.png
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no new files were added. The binary asset file at 'frontend/public/assets/generated/CETA-2.png' does not appear in the added files list.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace all broken CETA Galaxy logo image references with the path /assets/generated/CETA-2.png (matching the asset saved at frontend/public/assets/generated/CETA-2.png)
missing_requirements.reason: Navigation.tsx and HeroSection.tsx use '/assets/CETA-2.png' instead of '/assets/generated/CETA-2.png'. The path used does not correspond to the specified save location.
